must_detect.matched_text:
AurumTech Holdings Ltd (SGE‑ST Mainboard): Internal Cyber Incident Update — Internal use only, not for SGE‑Net release.
On 30 May 2026 23:41 SGT, SOC detected anomalous egress via vendor VPN on Segment B; CIRT Case Ref: AT‑C I R T‑2 0 2 6 / 05‑0 1 7.
Scope: Preliminary indicates exposure of low‑sensitivity personal data under the PDPA (names, work emails, office numbers) for ~212 SG staff; EID sa m p l e AUR‑**47H9; no NRICs, passwords, payroll or bank a/cs implicated.
Containment: VPN key rotated, AurumEdge WAF ruleset updated; third‑party “CitrineVault Pte. Ltd.” isolated; hash trace 89a4:2f...e f; ticket: INC‑202605‑017; link: https://intra.aurumtech.com/case?id=AT%2F2026%2F05%2F017&view=pr iv.
Impact/materiality: Current estimate <0.5% of FY2026 opex; no interruption to trading platforms; management assesses event not likely to be material to the issuer at this time.
MNPI/closed period: This information is not generally available and falls within the pre‑results closed period (1 Jun–15 Jul); directors/officers must not deal; insider list updated (Ms. Soo Lian, Mr. Wei Ong).
Disclosure plan: We will assess under SGE‑ST Listing Manual r.703; if material, an immediate SGE‑Net announcement will be filed; otherwise, disclosure will be made in the next quarterly business update.
Public‑status cross‑check: See already‑published SGE‑Net 12 Apr 2026 “Operational Resilience Update Q1” (public), which discussed sector‑wide phishing trends; that filing did not cover this 30 May event.
Selective disclosure controls: External counsel and M&A counterparties on project banyan (proposed acquisition of Flaris Renewables Pte. Ltd.) remain under NDA; no counterparties will be briefed until any SGE‑Net release.
Employment/HR: Affected staff will receive notice letters and credit monitoring offer; sample notice routed to com m s for QA; union representation not applicable; escalation contact dpo@aurumtech.com.sg.
Regulator/PDPA workflow: Notification draft to the Data Protection Authority of Singapore (DPAS) within 3 calendar days of assessment; breach log ref: DP‑2 0 2 6‑05‑AT‑017; data‑minimisation steps recorded.
Investor relations: We do not expect this to constitute a material adverse change (no MAC) to revenue or the project banyan timeline; press queries to ir@aurumtech.com.sg; do not attribute to threat actor in any off‑cycle
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
